name: 80" x 38"x18" Candy Canes on Red Christmas Gift Sack - Wondershop™
description:
Surprise a loved one with a new bike this Christmas by packing it in the Christmas Family Santa Sack Bike Bag Candy Canes on Red Gift Bag from Wondershop™. This red bike gift bag has a sack-like design with allover candy cane print for festive vibes. Made of plastic, this Santa sack bag is perfect for packaging bikes and other large Christmas gifts.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
